guide.title: ChoreSync User Guide
guide.subtitle: Complete guide to all features of the chore collaboration app.
guide.s1_login_li1: Open the app to see the Login screen.
guide.s1_login_li2: New users: click the No account? Sign up link.
guide.s1_login_li3: Enter your name, email, and password (min 6 chars) to register.
guide.s1_login_li4: After signing up you are automatically logged in to the dashboard.
guide.s1_family_li1: On first login, tap Create New Family on the dashboard.
guide.s1_family_li2: To join an existing family, enter an invite code in Join with Invite Code.
guide.s1_family_li3: Find your family's invite code on the Family Members page.
guide.s1_tip: 💡 One account can belong to multiple family groups.
guide.s2_desc: The dashboard shows family status and provides the AI chatbot.
guide.s2_li_family: My Family — list of your families and quick copy of invite code
guide.s2_li_tts: TTS Notification — ask the AI about chores or trigger voice commands
guide.s2_li_sse: Real-time 🟢 connection indicator — green dot next to ChoreSync means live notifications active
guide.s2_tip: 💡 Use the 🌐 button at the top to switch between Korean and English.
guide.s3_add_li1: Tap + Add Task to create a new task.
guide.s3_add_li2: Set name, category, assignee, repeat cycle, and intensity (Easy / Normal / Hard).
guide.s3_add_li3: After saving it appears immediately in the task list.
guide.s3_template_p: Use the Templates tab to save frequently used task patterns for reuse.
guide.s3_complete_li1: Click the ✅ Complete button on the right of any task.
guide.s3_complete_li2: Points are awarded and badge conditions are automatically checked.
guide.s3_complete_li3: Tasks requiring photo proof: attach a photo with the 📷 button.
guide.s3_tip: 💡 Completing tasks set to Hard intensity earns more points.
guide.s4_desc: Quests are challenges that reward points when a specific goal is achieved.
guide.s4_li1: Tap + Add Quest to create a new quest.
guide.s4_li2: Enter quest name, description, reward points, and deadline.
guide.s4_li3: After completing a quest, a family admin must approve it to award points.
guide.s4_tip: 💡 Try creating family co-op quests and tackle them together!
guide.s5_desc: A space to share what the family wants and make it happen with points.
guide.s5_li1: Tap + Add Wish to register a desired item.
guide.s5_li2: Family members vote 👍 to set priorities.
guide.s5_li3: Once the point goal is met, an admin marks it as Fulfilled.
guide.s6_desc: Spend points earned from completed tasks to buy family reward items.
guide.s6_add_li1: Click + Add Item on the shop page.
guide.s6_add_li2: Set item name, description, and point price.
guide.s6_buy_li1: Click the Buy button on the desired item.
guide.s6_buy_li2: Points are deducted and the admin fulfills the order.
guide.s6_tip: 💡 Your current point balance is shown at the top.
guide.s7_desc: View your task completion history in various charts.
guide.s7_li_heatmap: Annual Heatmap — GitHub-style activity heatmap showing daily completions by color
guide.s7_li_yearly: Yearly Comparison — monthly bar chart comparing completion counts across years
guide.s7_li_weekly: Weekly Trend — trend graph for the last 12/26/52 weeks
guide.s7_li_category: By Category — pie chart of completion distribution by category
guide.s7_tip: 💡 Use the name filter to view stats for a specific family member only.
guide.s8_desc: View task due dates and completion status in calendar view.
guide.s8_li_click: Click a date to see task details for that day
guide.s9_desc: Earn badges by achieving specific conditions. There are 12 badges.
guide.s9_streak_p: Complete tasks every day to build your consecutive streak. The longer your streak, the more points you earn.
guide.s9_tip: 💡 A toast notification appears at the bottom-right when you earn a badge.
guide.s10_invite_li1: Click Generate Invite Code on the members page.
guide.s10_invite_li2: Share the generated code with the person you want to invite.
guide.s10_invite_li3: They enter it in Join with Invite Code on the dashboard to join the family.
guide.s10_role_p: Use the edit button next to a member's name to change their family role (Dad / Mom / Eldest / ...).
guide.s11_desc: Connect smart devices via MQTT to automatically complete tasks.
guide.s11_li1: Tap + Add Device to register an MQTT device.
guide.s11_li2: Set the device Topic and trigger value.
guide.s11_li3: When the device sends that MQTT message, the linked task is automatically completed.
guide.s11_tip: 💡 Compatible with washing machines, robot vacuums, and other MQTT-enabled devices.
guide.s12_desc: Integrate with Home Assistant (HA) automations to manage your smart home and chores together.
guide.s12_li1: HA entity state change → automatic task completion trigger
guide.s12_li2: Task complete → run HA automation (lights, notifications, etc.)
guide.s12_li3: Access ChoreSync directly from the HA sidebar via the 🧹 icon
guide.s13_desc: Import task template packs shared by other users.
guide.s13_li1: Find the template pack you want in the marketplace.
guide.s13_li2: Click Import to automatically add the task templates.
guide.s13_li3: Create your own pack and Share it to contribute to the community.
